center.name: 东南欧
center.summary: 东南欧是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括长耳鸮、白肩雕、Olive-tree warbler，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in southeast Europe and the Near East

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The eastern imperial eagle (Aquila heliaca) is a large bird of prey that breeds in southeastern Europe and extensively through West and Central Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Central European adults are less migratory, at most merely wandering in winter. Long-eared owls that breed Scandinavia generally migrate to nearly anywhere in Europe, from Great Britain to Southeast Europe, though some may disperse as far as north Africa or Asia Minor.Lundberg, A
